Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
- Approximately 26% more km travelled on onsite roads compared to 2021
- Based on updated information, mean vehicle weight on onsite roads is almost doubled resulting in 74% higher EFs used by RWDI.

comments.comment:
- Approximately 26% more km travelled on onsite roads compared to 2021.
